data.title: Celsius estate alleges TrueUSD firms gambled customer deposits
data.description:
Celsius has filed a lawsuit against Archblock, alleging that it's failed to redeem millions of dollars worth of stablecoins.
source: https://protos.com/celsius-estate-alleges-trueusd-firms-gambled-customer-deposits/

data.title: Maple Finance CEO Highlights Blockchain's Potential in Private Credit Markets
data.description: Maple Finance CEO Sidney Powell has identified the tokenization of private credit markets as the most promising application of blockchain technology. According to NS3.AI, Powell emphasized that private credit, typically characterized by its opacity and illiquidity, presents significant opportunities when integrated with blockchain. This perspective underscores a strategic shift towards leveraging blockchain to unlock illiquid financial assets.

data.title: Alphabet's Stock Experiences Slight Decline Amid Market Sentiment
data.description: Alphabet's stock recently experienced a slight decline of 2.3%, though it remains up over 4% in 2026. According to NS3.AI, this dip is seen as a potential buying opportunity, reflecting broader market risk sentiment rather than specific concerns about Google's core operations. The company's growth is anticipated to continue, driven by Waymo's expansion and investments in artificial intelligence. Analyst price targets for Alphabet vary, with optimistic projections ranging from $350 to $375, while more cautious estimates are between $279 and $300.

data.title: SBI, Startale to Launch Regulated Yen Stablecoin
data.description:
SBI and Startale plan a regulated yen stablecoin for global settlement, leveraging Japan’s FSA framework and targeting institutional adoption by mid-2026.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/sbi-startale-to-launch-regulated-yen-stablecoin/

data.title: Saga Halts EVM Blockchain After $7 Million Hack
data.description: Saga has suspended its EVM blockchain operations following a hacking incident that led to losses of nearly $7 million. According to NS3.AI, the attacker exploited vulnerabilities possibly linked to private key compromise or smart contract abuse, laundering the stolen funds through various bridges and swaps. This event is part of a recent increase in hacks targeting DeFi platforms, which have resulted in over $30 million in thefts since the start of 2026.

data.title: Europe formally suspends US trade arrangements over Greenland dispute with Trump
data.description:
The European Parliament has halted approval of the transatlantic trade agreement reached with the United States last July, citing President Donald Trump’s demand to buy Greenland and his threats to slap fresh tariffs on European goods. The decision came Wednesday, hours after Trump used his speech at the World Economic Forum in Davos to push […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/europe-formally-suspends-us-trade-deal/

data.title: Cathie Wood Says Bitcoin’s Down Cycle Is Likely Over
data.description:
Bitcoin is currently trading at $88,383, near multi-month lows as volatility cools, but some long-term bulls argue the worst of the drawdown may already be behind the market. ARK Invest CEO Cathie Wood said this week that Bitcoin is pretty well through the down cycle. com
source: https://www.techgaged.com/cathie-wood-says-bitcoins-down-cycle-is-likely-over/

data.title: Trump Says the US Must Become the Crypto Capital to Outpace China – Here Is What’s Really at Stake
data.description:
In a recent statement, former President Donald Trump emphasized the urgent need for the United States to establish itself as the global leader in cryptocurrency, positioning itself as the crypto capital of the world in order to maintain a competitive edge over China. This assertion raises important questions about the implications of this transformation for the American economy, innovation, and regulatory landscape. It suggests that the race to dominate the cryptocurrency market is not just about financial gain, but also about technological leadership and national security. Here, we delve into the multifaceted stakes involved in this geopolitical and economic competition, examining how a firm commitment to becoming the crypto capital could impact everything from job creation and investment opportunities to international relations and the future of digital currencies.
source: https://blocknews.com/trump-says-the-us-must-become-the-crypto-capital-to-outpace-china-here-is-whats-really-at-stake/

data.title: BREAKING: Donald Trump Makes Hot Statement on Tariffs and Greenland – Bitcoin Jumps
data.description:
Following a NATO meeting with NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte, US President Donald Trump announced that a framework for a future agreement concerning Greenland and the wider Arctic region had been established. In line with this understanding, Trump announced that the tariffs scheduled to take effect on February 1 would not be implemented. Trump stated […] Continue Reading: BREAKING: Donald Trump Makes Hot Statement on Tariffs and Greenland – Bitcoin Jumps
source: https://en.bitcoinsistemi.com/breaking-donald-trump-makes-hot-statement-on-tariffs-and-greenland-bitcoin-jumps/

data.title: MicroStrategy Clarifies STRC Stock Not Backed by Bitcoin
data.description: A manager at MicroStrategy's Strategy unit erroneously stated that STRC stock is backed by Bitcoin collateral. According to NS3.AI, the company has repeatedly clarified in SEC filings that none of its equities, including STRC, are collateralized by its Bitcoin holdings. Although there are frequent mentions of Bitcoin-per-share metrics and dividend coverage, these references do not indicate ownership or collateral backing for the stocks.

data.title: Dollar Index Rises as Euro Declines Against U.S. Dollar
data.description: The dollar index (DXY) has experienced an increase of over ten points, currently standing at 98.8. According to ChainCatcher, the euro to U.S. dollar exchange rate (EUR/USD) saw a decline of nearly 20 points, now reported at 1.1685.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Warns Against Centralization in Crypto Projects
data.description: At the Convergence 2025 event, Vitalik Buterin highlighted the dangers of compromising on open-source principles in the cryptocurrency sector. According to NS3.AI, Buterin explained that the introduction of centralized components, such as closed servers, can erode the core values of decentralization. This shift not only undermines transparency but also increases the risk of projects being overtaken by centralized interest groups over time.
